visualStages.stageInfo:
(:action move_vert_to_flat
    :parameters (mov_player1 mov_player2 pos2_1 pos3_1 pos4_1)
    :precondition
      (and
        (not
          (blocked pos3_1)
        )
        (not
          (blocked pos3_1)
        )
        (at mov_player1 pos2_1)
        (at_above mov_player2 pos2_1)
        (or
          (and
            (up pos2_1 pos3_1)
            (up pos3_1 pos4_1)
          )
          (and
            (down pos2_1 pos3_1)
            (down pos3_1 pos4_1)
          )
          (and
            (left pos2_1 pos3_1)
            (left pos3_1 pos4_1)
          )
          (and
            (right pos2_1 pos3_1)
            (right pos3_1 pos4_1)
          )
        )
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (at mov_player1 pos3_1)
        (not
          (at mov_player1 pos2_1)
        )
        (at mov_player2 pos4_1)
        (not
          (at_above mov_player2 pos2_1)
        )
      )
  )

visualStages.stageName: (move_flat_to_flat mov_player2 mov_player1 pos4_1 pos3_1 pos4_2 pos3_2)
visualStages.stageInfo:
(:action move_flat_to_flat
    :parameters (mov_player2 mov_player1 pos4_1 pos3_1 pos4_2 pos3_2)
    :precondition
      (and
        (not
          (blocked pos4_2)
        )
        (not
          (blocked pos3_2)
        )
        (or
          (and
            (at mov_player2 pos4_1)
            (at mov_player1 pos3_1)
            (up pos4_1 pos3_1)
            (or
              (and
                (left pos4_1 pos4_2)
                (left pos3_1 pos3_2)
              )
              (and
                (right pos4_1 pos4_2)
                (right pos3_1 pos3_2)
              )
            )
          )
          (and
            (at mov_player2 pos4_1)
            (at mov_player1 pos3_1)
            (left pos4_1 pos3_1)
            (or
              (and
                (up pos4_1 pos4_2)
                (up pos3_1 pos3_2)
              )
              (and
                (down pos4_1 pos4_2)
                (down pos3_1 pos3_2)
              )
            )
          )
        )
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (at mov_player2 pos4_2)
        (not
          (at mov_player2 pos4_1)
        )
        (at mov_player1 pos3_2)
        (not
          (at mov_player1 pos3_1)
        )
      )
  )

(:action move_flat_to_vert
    :parameters (mov_player2 mov_player1 pos4_2 pos3_2 pos2_2)
    :precondition
      (or
        (and
          (not
            (blocked pos2_2)
          )
          (at mov_player2 pos4_2)
          (at mov_player1 pos3_2)
          (up pos4_2 pos3_2)
          (or
            (up pos3_2 pos2_2)
            (up pos2_2 pos4_2)
          )
        )
        (and
          (not
            (blocked pos2_2)
          )
          (at mov_player2 pos4_2)
          (at mov_player1 pos3_2)
          (left pos4_2 pos3_2)
          (or
            (left pos3_2 pos2_2)
            (left pos2_2 pos4_2)
          )
        )
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (at mov_player2 pos2_2)
        (not
          (at mov_player2 pos4_2)
        )
        (at_above mov_player1 pos2_2)
        (not
          (at mov_player1 pos3_2)
        )
      )
  )

(:action move_vert_to_flat

        (not

        )
        (at mov_player2 pos2_2)

        (or

          )
          (and

            (down pos2_3 pos2_4)
          )
          (and

          )
          (and
            (right pos2_2 pos2_3)
            (right pos2_3 pos2_4)
          )
        )
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (at mov_player2 pos2_3)

        (at mov_player1 pos2_4)

          (at_above mov_player1 pos2_2)
        )
      )
  )

(:action move_flat_to_vert

            (blocked pos2_5)
          )
          (at mov_player2 pos2_3)
          (at mov_player1 pos2_4)
          (up pos2_3 pos2_4)
          (or

        )
        (and
          (not
            (blocked pos2_5)
          )
          (at mov_player2 pos2_3)

          (left pos2_3 pos2_4)
          (or
            (left pos2_4 pos2_5)
            (left pos2_5 pos2_3)
          )
        )
      )
    :effect

(:action move_vert_to_flat

        (not

        )
        (at mov_player2 pos2_5)

          (and

(:action move_flat_to_vert
    :parameters (mov_player1 mov_player2 pos4_5 pos3_5 pos5_5)
    :precondition
      (or
        (and
          (not
            (blocked pos5_5)
          )
          (at mov_player1 pos4_5)
          (at mov_player2 pos3_5)
          (up pos4_5 pos3_5)
          (or

          )
        )
        (and
          (not

          )
          (at mov_player1 pos4_5)
